steps: File French WHT refund claim with BNP Paribas using Form 5001 for EUR 3,744.00 excess withholding on TTE dividend
Submit treaty residency certificate from Norwegian Tax Administration to support 15% FR-NO treaty rate application
Request BNP Paribas provide detailed calculation showing how 13.5% rate was applied instead of treaty rate
Follow up with custodian within 30 days if refund processing is delayed

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
